title: readiness_check
description: Sent by the server to ask the outbound Bridge to check whether its local Agent runtime is currently ready to answer match decisions. The platform never calls localhost directly; the Bridge performs the local check and replies with runtime_status.

request_id.description: Opaque request ID echoed by runtime_status.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the check, such as competition_finals.

timeout_ms.description: Suggested time budget for the local readiness check.

match_id.description: Envelope-level field, not used for readiness_check.
